---
title: "Lecture 12 - Factorial ANOVA of Penguin Mass Balanced"
author: "Bill Perry"


knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    paged.print: true
    collapse: true

format:
  html:
    downloads: [docx, pptx, typst]  # This creates download links for all three
  revealjs:
    output-ext: "slides.html"
  docx: default
  pptx: default
---

# Lecture 11: Review
